productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men White Pack of 3 V-Briefs
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Pack of three white briefs A hot winter collection from undercolors of benetton, this V-cut brief from Undercolors is crafted from a quick dry soft cotton fabric. The V-cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the label stitched on the front offers abrasion-free comfort. Crafted from 100% cotton Broad and stretchable waistband in contrast colour that sits snug and comfortably Brand label on the outer front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
